intro: Anogramma lorentzii, also known as the Lorentz's Anogramma, is a plant species belonging to the Anogramma genus, characterized by its unique, fern-like appearance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various skin conditions and wounds. The bioactive constituents of Anogramma lorentzii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The plant is commonly used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat skin irritations, wounds, and infections in traditional medicine.
